  Stage 1 — feature sheet:
  - DOC1: References other papers such as Burke et al. (2013), Stützle & López-Ibáñez (2019), Langdon & Poli (2013), Zhang et al. (2023), O'Neill et al. (2010), Chen et al. (2021), Austin et al. (2021), Li et al. (2023b), Mahowald et al. (2023), Yang et al. (2023), Meyerson et al. (2023), and Romera-Paredes et al. (2024).
  - DOC2: References other papers such as Conflict-Based Search (CBS) [7], ECBS [8], EECBS [9], PRIMAL [11], PRIMAL2 [12], Deep Q-learning [16], SCRIMP [17], SACHA [18], DCC [13], GTrXL [29], and DHC [14].
  - DOC3: References other papers such as Anderson et al. [10] and Song et al. [12].

  Stage 2 — structure selection and mapping:
  - The structure should be a "mapping" because we need to map each paper to its references and citations.
  - We will create a mapping for each paper, listing its references and citations.
  - Since the question does not provide a fixed set of candidate labels, we will use open labels based on the facts.
